title: Nursing Clothing - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Child Care & Parenting > Nursing Clothing 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER BRAS2MOMS AT COLUMBIA MEMORIAL HOSPITAL BRAS2MOMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides nursing bras and tanks to moms who cannot afford them. Each mom is eligible to receive up to two items. Most bras are gently used and all are in excellent condition. 2111 Exchange Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Mothers, at least two weeks post-partum, who have difficulty affording a nursing bra Hours: No standard hours Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER BRAS2MOMS
